lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਬਨਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur siau jaa kee ban aaee |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to their Lord and Master
Nanak has obtained the treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||27||78||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਤ ਖਰਚਤ ਬਿਲਛਤ ਦੇਵਨ ਕਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khaat kharachat bilachhat devan kau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They have plenty to eat, spend, enjoy and give. ||1||Pause||
are satisfied and fulfilled with the perfect food. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਛੂ ਨ ਥੋਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਉ ॥
lines.translit: kachhoo na thoraa har bhagatan kau |
lines.english: The Lord's devotees never run short of anything.
- how can any mere mortal stand up to him? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਦਸ ਅਸਟ ਸਿਧਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sevaa das asatt sidhaaee |
lines.english: One who is served by the eighteen supernatural powers of the Siddhas
One who has the Unfathomable Lord of the Universe as his Master

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau deaa karahu mere suaamee |
lines.english: That one, upon whom You have showered Your Mercy, O my Lord Master

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਲਕ ਦਿਸਟਿ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਲਾਗਹੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: palak disatt taa kee laagahu paaee |3|
lines.english: - grasp his feet, even for an instant. ||3||
- says Nanak, he does not lack anything. ||4||28||79||
When I meditate on my True Guru,
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
The record of my account is erased, and my doubts are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਮਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tab merai man mahaa sukh paaeaa |1|
lines.english: my mind becomes supremely peaceful. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਜਨ ਭਏ ਭਗਵੰਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam rate jan bhe bhagavantaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, His humble servant is blessed with good fortune. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਮੈ ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jau mai ott gahee prabh teree |
lines.english: When I took to Your Protection, O God,
When I remember my Lord and Master,
my fears are dispelled, O my friend. ||2||
my desires were fulfilled. ||3||
Gazing upon the wonder of Your play, my mind has become encouraged.
Servant Nanak relies on You alone. ||4||29||80||
Falling into the well, the mortal eats the sweet treats of Maya. ||1||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Night and day, the mouse of time gnaws away at the rope of life.
Thinking and planning, the night of the life is passing away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਚਿਤਵਤ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਸਾਰਿੰਗਪਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik rang maaeaa ke chitavat kabahoo na simarai saaringapaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Thinking of the many pleasures of Maya, the mortal never remembers the Lord, the Sustainer of the earth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲ ਕੈ ਫਾਂਸਿ ਸਕਤ ਸਰੁ ਸਾਂਧਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaal kai faans sakat sar saandhiaa |2|
lines.english: But the noose of death is around his neck, and Shakti, the power of Maya, has aimed her arrows at him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰੁਮ ਕੀ ਛਾਇਆ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਬਾਂਧਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: drum kee chhaaeaa nihachal grihu baandhiaa |
lines.english: Believing the shade of the tree to be permanent, he builds his house beneath it.
The sandy shore is being washed away by the waves,
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, chant the Name of the Lord, the King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਥਾਨੁ ਮੂੜਿ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so thaan moorr nihachal kar paaeaa |3|
lines.english: but the fool still believes that place to be permanent. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੂ ਕਰਤੀ ਕੇਲ ॥
lines.translit: aun kai sang too karatee kel |
lines.english: With that, you are engaged in playful sport;
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Thukay 9:
Nanak lives by singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||30||81||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੁਮ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਊ ਲੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang tum sabh koaoo lorai |
lines.english: With that, everyone longs for you;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਮ ਤੁਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੇਲ ॥
lines.translit: aun kai sang ham tum sang mel |
lines.english: with that, I am joined to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਬਿਨਾ ਕੋਊ ਮੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਜੋਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: os binaa koaoo mukh nahee jorai |1|
lines.english: without it, no one would even look at your face. ||1||
Where is that detached soul now contained?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਤੁਹੀ ਦੁਹੇਰੀ ਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin tuhee duheree ree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without it, you are miserable. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੂ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang too grih meh maahar |
lines.english: With that, you are the woman of the house;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੂ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਜਾਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang too hoee hai jaahar |
lines.english: with that, you are respected.
without it, you are reduced to dust. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੂ ਰਖੀ ਪਪੋਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang too rakhee papol |
lines.english: With that, you are caressed;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੁਮ ਸਾਕੁ ਜਗਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang tum saak jagat |
lines.english: with that, you have relatives in the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਥਾਟੀ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang teree sabh bidh thaattee |
lines.english: With that, you are adorned in every way;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨੑ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਮਾਨੁ ਮਹਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: auna kai sang teraa maan mehat |
lines.english: With that, you have honor and respect;

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਬਿਨਾ ਤੂੰ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਮਾਟੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: os binaa toon hoee hai maattee |3|
lines.english: without it, you are reduced to dust. ||3||
It acts according to the Command of the Lord's Will.
That detached soul is neither born, nor dies.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
He alone knows His All-powerful creative nature. ||4||31||82||
O Nanak, having fashioned the body, the Lord unites the soul with it, and separates them again;
